title: Teriyaki Tinged Korean Couscous Bowl
description: A diabetic-friendly, date-night Korean dish featuring springy couscous, jammy teriyaki sauce, and a touch of kombu-cold-extract.
instructions: Cook couscous according to package instructions. In a small saucepan, heat 1 tablespoon of sesame oil over medium heat. Add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant. In a separate saucepan, combine teriyaki sauce, kombu-cold-extract, and soy sauce. Bring to a simmer over medium heat. Reduce heat to low and cook for 5-7 minutes, until the sauce thickens. In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of sesame oil over medium-high heat. Add diced protein and cook until browned and cooked through. Add cooked couscous to the skillet and stir to combine. Pour the teriyaki sauce over the top of the couscous and protein mixture. Sprinkle with toasted sesame seeds and thinly sliced green onions. Serve immediately.
